children.heading: .—Authority To Provide Assistance
children.label: a .—Authority To Provide Assistance
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy may provide an entity described in subsection (b) with assistance in support of a transfer of a vessel or shipboard equipment described in such subsection that is being executed under section 2572, 8676, 8677, or 8765 of this title, or under any other authority.

children.label: A
children.text: is owned and maintained by the Navy, is located at a Navy facility, and is not in active use; and

children.label: B
children.text: is being transferred to an entity designated by the Secretary of the Navy or by law to receive transfer of the vessel; and

children.label: A
children.text: is on a vessel described in paragraph (1)(A); and

children.label: B
children.text: is being transferred to an entity designated by the Secretary of the Navy or by law to receive transfer of the equipment.

children.heading: .—Reimbursement
children.label: c .—Reimbursement
children.text: The Secretary may require a recipient of assistance under subsection (a) to reimburse the Navy for amounts expended by the Navy in providing the assistance.

children.heading: .—Deposit of Funds Received
children.label: d .—Deposit of Funds Received
children.text: Funds received in a fiscal year under subsection (c) shall be credited to the appropriation available for such fiscal year for operation and maintenance for the office of the Navy managing inactive ships, shall be merged with other sums in the appropriation that are available for such office, and shall be available for the same purposes and period as the sums with which merged.
